channel.title: Tech Insights

item.title: Dropping Docker Build Times from 30s to 2s

item.title: What happens when your phone is confiscated at the airport
item.description: Even if you've done nothing wrong, it's never a good idea to hand your phone to the cops. But international travelers at American airports often have no choice - even if they're US citizens. When...

item.title: New York lawmakers pass one-year ban on new data centers
item.description: The New York State legislature passed a one-year moratorium on new large data centers, the first statewide ban of its kind if Democratic Governor Kathy Hochul signs it into law. Lawmakers behind...

item.title: Has Microsoft Lost Its Mojo (Again)?
item.description: Microsoft’s AI products aren’t selling, and Github’s been plagued with troubles. WIRED spoke with VP Scott Hanselman about whether the company is in catch-up mode.

item.title: Android Spyware Asin Targets Arabic Users via Fake News, PDF and War Map Apps
item.description: Arabic-speaking users have emerged as the target of a new Android spyware codenamed Asin, according to findings from ESET. The Slovakian cybersecurity company said it first detected the malware...

item.title: The token bill comes due: Inside the industry scramble to manage AI’s runaway costs
item.description: "The whole conversation shifted from tokenmaxxing and 'go fast' to 'we need guardrails, how do we control this?'"

item.title: AI Worm
item.description: Researchers have prototyped an AI-powered internet worm. The coolest thing about the prototype is that it carries its own LLM with it, and runs it on computers that have been broken into. This is...

item.title: AirTrunk commits $30B to build 5GW of AI data centers in India
item.description: The Australian data center operator plans to set up 5GW of capacity in India.

item.title: This chunky little tablet got my kid to clean up his toys
item.description: Never underestimate the power that a cheap tablet holds over a kid under six. The Skylight Buddy is a device with one job: to be a cute little guy that helps your kid track routines and chores....

item.title: I customized a MacBook Neo with colorful spare parts
